hero.imageAlt: Aerial view of Sømliøya in winter light
hero.title: Sømliøya
hero.subtitle: Where the world becomes quieter

poeticParagraphs:
Sømliøya is an island. It is small, private and simple. No roads, no traffic — only water and rocks. Birds, trees and space.

You come here to be. To write. To think. To celebrate, to create, to say goodbye, to make memories.

Fires are lit at the edge of the water, fish are caught and eaten, and kayaks glide quietly through the fjord.
secondParagraphs:
There is no schedule here, and nothing that must be done. The days are shaped by light and weather, by the tide and the fire.

Whether you come for a single quiet night or a longer gathering of friends, the island asks only one thing of you — that you slow down.
pullQuote: It is a place where you can step outside the world for a while.

mapCta.heading: See the island from above
mapCta.description: Drift above the fjord in an interactive 3D model of Sømliøya, rendered in real time from satellite data.

firstImage.alt: Mirror-still fjord at sunset with mountains

secondImage.alt: Dramatic orange and pink sunset over the Norwegian fjord
